mapper.insert: insert into work_order_reminder_config(config_key, min_interval_minutes, max_daily_reminders, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{configKey}, #{minIntervalMinutes}, #{maxDailyReminders}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_reminder_config set config_key = #{configKey}, min_interval_minutes = #{minIntervalMinutes}, max_daily_reminders = #{maxDailyReminders}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, config_key, min_interval_minutes, max_daily_reminders, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_reminder_config where id = #{id}
select id, config_key, min_interval_minutes, max_daily_reminders, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_reminder_config where config_key = #{configKey}
select id, config_key, min_interval_minutes, max_daily_reminders, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at from work_order_reminder_config order by id asc
